title: ITALY enforcement action against Intesa Sanpaolo S.p.A. (31,800,000)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 31,800,000 onIntesa Sanpaolo S.p.A.
